verses.greek: Ἰούδας Ἰησοῦ Χριστοῦ δοῦλος, ἀδελφὸς δὲ Ἰακώβου, τοῖς ἐν θεῷ πατρὶ ⸀ἠγαπημένοις καὶ Ἰησοῦ Χριστῷ τετηρημένοις κλητοῖς·
verses.mistral: Jude, a servant of Jesus Christ, and brother of James, to those who are called, sanctified by God the Father and kept for Jesus Christ:
verses.kjv: Jude, the servant of Jesus Christ, and brother of James, to them that are sanctified by God the Father, and preserved in Jesus Christ, and called:

words.gloss: but, on the other hand, and

verses.greek: ἔλεος ὑμῖν καὶ εἰρήνη καὶ ἀγάπη πληθυνθείη.
verses.mistral: Mercy, peace, and love be multiplied to you.
verses.kjv: Mercy unto you, and peace, and love, be multiplied.

verses.greek: Ἀγαπητοί, πᾶσαν σπουδὴν ποιούμενος γράφειν ὑμῖν περὶ τῆς κοινῆς ⸀ἡμῶν σωτηρίας ἀνάγκην ἔσχον γράψαι ὑμῖν παρακαλῶν ἐπαγωνίζεσθαι τῇ ἅπαξ παραδοθείσῃ τοῖς ἁγίοις πίστει.
verses.mistral: Beloved, I have a great urgency to write to you concerning our common salvation, for it is necessary for me to exhort you to contend earnestly for the faith once for all delivered to the saints.
verses.kjv: Beloved, when I gave all diligence to write unto you of the common salvation, it was needful for me to write unto you, and exhort you that ye should earnestly contend for the faith which was once delivered unto the saints.

words.gloss: all, the whole, every kind of

verses.greek: παρεισέδυσαν γάρ τινες ἄνθρωποι, οἱ πάλαι προγεγραμμένοι εἰς τοῦτο τὸ κρίμα, ἀσεβεῖς, τὴν τοῦ θεοῦ ἡμῶν χάριτα μετατιθέντες εἰς ἀσέλγειαν καὶ τὸν μόνον ⸀δεσπότην καὶ κύριον ἡμῶν Ἰησοῦν Χριστὸν ἀρνούμενοι.
verses.mistral: These men, once long ago condemned, have ungodly perverted the grace of our God into licentiousness and have denied the only Lord Jesus Christ, our Master.
verses.kjv: For there are certain men crept in unawares, who were before of old ordained to this condemnation, ungodly men, turning the grace of our God into lasciviousness, and denying the only Lord God, and our Lord Jesus Christ.

words.gloss: a man, one of the human race

verses.greek: Ὑπομνῆσαι δὲ ὑμᾶς βούλομαι, εἰδότας ⸂ὑμᾶς ἅπαξ⸃ ⸀πάντα, ὅτι ⸀Ἰησοῦς λαὸν ἐκ γῆς Αἰγύπτου σώσας τὸ δεύτερον τοὺς μὴ πιστεύσαντας ἀπώλεσεν,
verses.mistral: I want to remind you, that knowing all of you once, Jesus saved a people from the land of Egypt who did not believe, and He destroyed them.
verses.kjv: I will therefore put you in remembrance, though ye once knew this, how that the Lord, having saved the people out of the land of Egypt, afterward destroyed them that believed not.

words.gloss: but, on the other hand, and
all, the whole, every kind of
from out, out from among, from
second, in the second place, for the second time

verses.greek: ἀγγέλους τε τοὺς μὴ τηρήσαντας τὴν ἑαυτῶν ἀρχὴν ἀλλὰ ἀπολιπόντας τὸ ἴδιον οἰκητήριον εἰς κρίσιν μεγάλης ἡμέρας δεσμοῖς ἀϊδίοις ὑπὸ ζόφον τετήρηκεν·
verses.mistral: Maintained angels who did not keep their own position, but left their proper dwelling, He has kept in eternal chains under darkness for the judgment of the great day.
verses.kjv: And the angels which kept not their first estate, but left their own habitation, he hath reserved in everlasting chains under darkness unto the judgment of the great day.

words.gloss: I leave, leave behind, desert, am reserved

verses.greek: ὡς Σόδομα καὶ Γόμορρα καὶ αἱ περὶ αὐτὰς πόλεις, τὸν ὅμοιον ⸂τρόπον τούτοις⸃ ἐκπορνεύσασαι καὶ ἀπελθοῦσαι ὀπίσω σαρκὸς ἑτέρας, πρόκεινται δεῖγμα πυρὸς αἰωνίου δίκην ὑπέχουσαι.
verses.mistral: Like Sodom and Gomorrah, and the cities around them, they are exhibiting examples of eternal fire's judgment.
verses.kjv: Even as Sodom and Gomorrha, and the cities about them in like manner, giving themselves over to fornication, and going after strange flesh, are set forth for an example, suffering the vengeance of eternal fire.

words.gloss: as, like as, how, while, so that
he, she, it, they, them, same
I come or go away from, depart, return

verses.greek: Ὁμοίως μέντοι καὶ οὗτοι ἐνυπνιαζόμενοι σάρκα μὲν μιαίνουσιν, κυριότητα δὲ ἀθετοῦσιν, δόξας δὲ βλασφημοῦσιν.
verses.mistral: These men also are dreamers, defiling the flesh, rejecting authority, and blaspheming glories.
verses.kjv: Likewise also these filthy dreamers defile the flesh, despise dominion, and speak evil of dignities.

words.gloss: but, on the other hand, and
but, on the other hand, and

verses.greek: ὁ δὲ Μιχαὴλ ὁ ἀρχάγγελος, ὅτε τῷ διαβόλῳ διακρινόμενος διελέγετο περὶ τοῦ Μωϋσέως σώματος, οὐκ ἐτόλμησεν κρίσιν ἐπενεγκεῖν βλασφημίας, ἀλλὰ εἶπεν· Ἐπιτιμήσαι σοι κύριος.
verses.mistral: Michael the archangel, when contending with the devil over Moses' body, dared not bring a condemnation of blasphemy, but said, "The Lord rebuke you."
verses.kjv: Yet Michael the archangel, when contending with the devil he disputed about the body of Moses, durst not bring against him a railing accusation, but said, The Lord rebuke thee.

words.gloss: but, on the other hand, and
a ruler of angels, a superior angel, an archangel

verses.greek: οὗτοι δὲ ὅσα μὲν οὐκ οἴδασιν βλασφημοῦσιν, ὅσα δὲ φυσικῶς ὡς τὰ ἄλογα ζῷα ἐπίστανται, ἐν τούτοις φθείρονται.
verses.mistral: These, who in the things they do not know, are blaspheming; but in what naturally behaves like unreasonable animals, they perish.
verses.kjv: But these speak evil of those things which they know not: but what they know naturally, as brute beasts, in those things they corrupt themselves.

words.gloss: but, on the other hand, and
how much, how great, how many
how much, how great, how many
but, on the other hand, and
as, like as, how, while, so that

verses.greek: οὐαὶ αὐτοῖς, ὅτι τῇ ὁδῷ τοῦ Κάϊν ἐπορεύθησαν, καὶ τῇ πλάνῃ τοῦ Βαλαὰμ μισθοῦ ἐξεχύθησαν, καὶ τῇ ἀντιλογίᾳ τοῦ Κόρε ἀπώλοντο.
verses.mistral: Woe to them, for they have gone the way of Cain, and have run in the errant path of Balaam for reward, and perished in the contradiction of Korah.
verses.kjv: Woe unto them! for they have gone in the way of Cain, and ran greedily after the error of Balaam for reward, and perished in the gainsaying of Core.

words.gloss: he, she, it, they, them, same

verses.greek: οὗτοί εἰσιν ⸀οἱ ἐν ταῖς ἀγάπαις ὑμῶν σπιλάδες συνευωχούμενοι, ἀφόβως ἑαυτοὺς ποιμαίνοντες, νεφέλαι ἄνυδροι ὑπὸ ἀνέμων παραφερόμεναι, δένδρα φθινοπωρινὰ ἄκαρπα δὶς ἀποθανόντα ἐκριζωθέντα,
verses.mistral: These are senseless men, feasting in your love-feasts while they are unsparing of themselves, clouds without water carried along by winds, autumn trees twice dead and uprooted,
verses.kjv: These are spots in your feasts of charity, when they feast with you, feeding themselves without fear: clouds they are without water, carried about of winds; trees whose fruit withereth, without fruit, twice dead, plucked up by the roots;

words.gloss: I turn aside, carry away, remove
I am dying, am about to die

verses.greek: κύματα ἄγρια θαλάσσης ἐπαφρίζοντα τὰς ἑαυτῶν αἰσχύνας, ἀστέρες πλανῆται οἷς ὁ ζόφος τοῦ σκότους εἰς αἰῶνα τετήρηται.
verses.mistral: Wild waves of the sea foaming up their own shame, wandering stars for whom the blackness of darkness is reserved forever.
verses.kjv: Raging waves of the sea, foaming out their own shame; wandering stars, to whom is reserved the blackness of darkness for ever.

words.gloss: an age, a cycle of time

verses.greek: Προεφήτευσεν δὲ καὶ τούτοις ἕβδομος ἀπὸ Ἀδὰμ Ἑνὼχ λέγων· Ἰδοὺ ἦλθεν κύριος ἐν ἁγίαις μυριάσιν αὐτοῦ,
verses.mistral: Has come the Lord in His holy multitudes.
verses.kjv: And Enoch also, the seventh from Adam, prophesied of these, saying, Behold, the Lord cometh with ten thousands of his saints,

words.gloss: but, on the other hand, and
he, she, it, they, them, same

verses.greek: ποιῆσαι κρίσιν κατὰ πάντων καὶ ἐλέγξαι ⸂πάντας τοὺς ἀσεβεῖς⸃ περὶ πάντων τῶν ἔργων ἀσεβείας αὐτῶν ὧν ἠσέβησαν καὶ περὶ πάντων τῶν σκληρῶν ὧν ἐλάλησαν κατ’ αὐτοῦ ἁμαρτωλοὶ ἀσεβεῖς.
verses.mistral: Condemns all, and exposes the ungodly concerning all their ungodly deeds, which they have committed; and condemns them all for their hard speeches against Him, sinners and ungodly.
verses.kjv: To execute judgment upon all, and to convince all that are ungodly among them of all their ungodly deeds which they have ungodly committed, and of all their hard speeches which ungodly sinners have spoken against him.

all, the whole, every kind of
all, the whole, every kind of
all, the whole, every kind of

I am impious, irreverent, do impiously
all, the whole, every kind of

verses.greek: οὗτοί εἰσιν γογγυσταί, μεμψίμοιροι, κατὰ τὰς ἐπιθυμίας ⸀αὐτῶν πορευόμενοι, καὶ τὸ στόμα αὐτῶν λαλεῖ ὑπέρογκα, θαυμάζοντες πρόσωπα ὠφελείας χάριν.
verses.mistral: These are grumblers, malcontents, always complaining, and walking according to their own desires; and their mouth speaks proud things, knowing nothing, but only slanderously uttering against others for personal gain.
verses.kjv: These are murmurers, complainers, walking after their own lusts; and their mouth speaketh great swelling words, having men's persons in admiration because of advantage.

words.gloss: down from, against, according to, throughout, during
desire, eagerness for, inordinate desire, lust
he, she, it, they, them, same
he, she, it, they, them, same

verses.greek: Ὑμεῖς δέ, ἀγαπητοί, μνήσθητε τῶν ῥημάτων τῶν προειρημένων ὑπὸ τῶν ἀποστόλων τοῦ κυρίου ἡμῶν Ἰησοῦ Χριστοῦ·
verses.mistral: Remember the words of the apostles of our Lord Jesus Christ, dear ones.
verses.kjv: But, beloved, remember ye the words which were spoken before of the apostles of our Lord Jesus Christ;

words.gloss: but, on the other hand, and
an apostle, a messenger, an envoy, a delegate

verses.greek: ὅτι ἔλεγον ⸀ὑμῖν· ⸂Ἐπ’ ἐσχάτου χρόνου⸃ ἔσονται ἐμπαῖκται κατὰ τὰς ἑαυτῶν ἐπιθυμίας πορευόμενοι τῶν ἀσεβειῶν.
verses.mistral: In the last time, they will mock after their own ungodly desires.
verses.kjv: How that they told you there should be mockers in the last time, who should walk after their own ungodly lusts.

words.gloss: on, to, against, on the basis of, at
down from, against, according to, throughout, during
desire, eagerness for, inordinate desire, lust

verses.greek: οὗτοί εἰσιν οἱ ἀποδιορίζοντες, ψυχικοί, πνεῦμα μὴ ἔχοντες.
verses.mistral: These are the ones who separate themselves, the worldly, having no spirit.
verses.kjv: These be they who separate themselves, sensual, having not the Spirit.

verses.greek: ὑμεῖς δέ, ἀγαπητοί, ⸂ἐποικοδομοῦντες ἑαυτοὺς τῇ ἁγιωτάτῃ ὑμῶν πίστει⸃, ἐν πνεύματι ἁγίῳ προσευχόμενοι,
verses.mistral: You, beloved, are building yourselves up in the most holy faith, praying in the Holy Spirit.
verses.kjv: But ye, beloved, building up yourselves on your most holy faith, praying in the Holy Ghost,

words.gloss: but, on the other hand, and

verses.greek: ἑαυτοὺς ἐν ἀγάπῃ θεοῦ τηρήσατε προσδεχόμενοι τὸ ἔλεος τοῦ κυρίου ἡμῶν Ἰησοῦ Χριστοῦ εἰς ζωὴν αἰώνιον.
verses.mistral: Maintain yourselves in love of God, waiting for the mercy of our Lord Jesus Christ unto eternal life.
verses.kjv: Keep yourselves in the love of God, looking for the mercy of our Lord Jesus Christ unto eternal life.

verses.greek: καὶ οὓς μὲν ⸀ἐλεᾶτε ⸂διακρινομένους,
verses.mistral: Condemn them
verses.kjv: And of some have compassion, making a difference:

verses.greek: οὓς δὲ σῴζετε ἐκ πυρὸς ἁρπάζοντες, οὓς δὲ ἐλεᾶτε ἐν φόβῳ⸃, μισοῦντες καὶ τὸν ἀπὸ τῆς σαρκὸς ἐσπιλωμένον χιτῶνα.
verses.mistral: Saving from fire those you are snatching, those whom you fear, hating even the garment stained by the flesh.
verses.kjv: And others save with fear, pulling them out of the fire; hating even the garment spotted by the flesh.

words.gloss: but, on the other hand, and
from out, out from among, from
I seize, snatch, obtain by robbery
but, on the other hand, and

verses.greek: Τῷ δὲ δυναμένῳ φυλάξαι ⸀ὑμᾶς ἀπταίστους καὶ στῆσαι κατενώπιον τῆς δόξης αὐτοῦ ἀμώμους ἐν ἀγαλλιάσει
verses.mistral: Makes you able to save and keep you unstained for his presence, blameless in exultation
verses.kjv: Now unto him that is able to keep you from falling, and to present you faultless before the presence of his glory with exceeding joy,

words.gloss: but, on the other hand, and
he, she, it, they, them, same

verses.greek: ⸀μόνῳ θεῷ σωτῆρι ἡμῶν ⸂διὰ Ἰησοῦ Χριστοῦ τοῦ κυρίου ἡμῶν⸃ ⸀δόξα μεγαλωσύνη κράτος καὶ ἐξουσία ⸂πρὸ παντὸς τοῦ αἰῶνος⸃ καὶ νῦν καὶ εἰς πάντας τοὺς αἰῶνας· ἀμήν.
verses.mistral: To God our Savior, through Jesus Christ our Lord, be glory, majesty, power and authority before all time, now and for all eternities. Amen.
verses.kjv: To the only wise God our Saviour, be glory and majesty, dominion and power, both now and ever. Amen.

an age, a cycle of time
all, the whole, every kind of
an age, a cycle of time
verily, truly, amen, so let it be
